sqlCommand.descr: delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co like '599%' and GL like '40%'
insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, PC, BusCat, RiskTerr,ReinLoc,Amt1) (select '[batchID]-data2', Co, GL, PC, BusCat, RiskTerr,ReinLoc,Amt1  from TransX  where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 <>0)
insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, PC, BusCat, RiskTerr,ReinLoc,Amt1) (select '[batchID]-data3', Co, GL, PC, BusCat, RiskTerr,ReinLoc,Amt1  from TransX  where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co like '599%')
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co like '599%'
update TransX set Flex6 = 'Insurance(gross)' where KeyID = '[batchID]-data3' and GL in ('4600000','4600003','46300000')
update TransX set Flex6 = 'Reinsurance(ceded)' where KeyID = '[batchID]-data3' and GL in ('4610000','46400000')
update TransX set RiskTerr = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and RiskTerr in ('unknown','UNKN','UNUN','WWWW','WWUS','WWUC')
update TransX set ReinLoc = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and ReinLoc in ('unknown','UNKN','UNUN','WWWW','WWUS','WWUC')
update TransX set Flex6 = (case when BusCat < '30' then 'Insurance(gross)' else 'Reinsurance(ceded)' end), Amt1 = -Amt1 where KeyID = '[batchID]'
Update TransX set Flex5 = r.Descr, Flex4 = r.Region from TransX t inner join RiskTerrs r on t.RiskTerr = r.RiskTerr where KeyID = '[batchID]' and coalesce(Flex5,'') = ''
Update TransX set Flex5 = r.Descr, Flex4 = r.Region from TransX t inner join ReinLocs r on t.ReinLoc = r.ReinLoc where KeyID = '[batchID]' and coalesce(Flex5,'') = ''
Update TransX set Flex4 = c.Region,Flex5 = c.Region from TransX t inner join Companies c on t.Co = c.Co where KeyID = '[batchID]' and coalesce(Flex5,'') = ''
Update TransX set Flex5 = 'Canada' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex4 = 'Canada'
Update TransX set Flex4 = 'Asia' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex4 = 'Far East'
Update TransX set Flex4 = 'United States', Flex5 = 'United States' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex4 = 'US'
Update TransX set Flex4 = 'All other American Countries' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex4 = 'Oth America'
Update TransX set Flex4 = 'All other American Countries', Flex5 = 'Other American Countries' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex4 = 'Intl'
Update TransX set Flex5 = 'South Korea' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 = 'Korea'

Update t set Flex5 = m.Field1 from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Descr = t.Flex4 and m.Field1 like '%other%' and m.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m.ID = 'Countries' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not t.Flex5 in (Select Field1 from Misc_Tables where Table_ID = 'IR17' and ID = 'Countries')

Update TransX set Flex8 = (case when Flex6 = 'Reinsurance(ceded)' then 'Ceded' else (case when substring(PC,1,3) in ('7NL','7UI') then 'Direct' else 'Assumed' end) end) where KeyID = '[batchID]-data3'
Update TransX set Flex7 = 'Marine Cargo' where KeyID = '[batchID]-data3' and PC like '7NLSP%'
Update TransX set Flex7 = 'Fidelity/Surety' where KeyID = '[batchID]-data3' and PC like '7URSC%'
Update TransX set Flex7 = 'Credit' where KeyID = '[batchID]-data3' and PC like '7%SC%' and Flex7 is null
Update TransX set Flex7 = 'Aviation' where KeyID = '[batchID]-data3' and PC like '7%SP%'
Update TransX set Flex7 = 'Hail/CROP' where KeyID = '[batchID]-data3' and PC like '7UICR%'
Update TransX set Flex7 = 'Ocean marine' where KeyID = '[batchID]-data3' and PC like '7UISP%'
Update TransX set Flex7 = 'Other (Please provide breakdown in attachment)' where KeyID = '[batchID]-data3' and PC like '7NLSC%'
Update TransX set Flex7 = 'Reinsurance - Nonproportional Assumed Property' where KeyID = '[batchID]-data3' and PC like '7%PR%' and Flex7 is null
Update TransX set Flex7 = 'Reinsurance - Nonproportional Assumed Liability' where KeyID = '[batchID]-data3' and PC like '7%CA%' and Flex7 is null
Update TransX set Flex7 = 'Reinsurance - Nonproportional Assumed Specialty Lines' where KeyID = '[batchID]-data3' and (PC like '7%SP%' or PC like '7%SC%' ) and Flex7 is null
Update TransX set Flex7 = 'Reinsurance - Nonproportional Assumed Liability' where KeyID = '[batchID]-data3' and Flex7 is null

Update TransX set Flex1 = (case when substring(PC,1,3) = '570' then 'UR' else substring(PC,2,2) end), Flex2 = (case when substring(PC,1,3) = '570' then 'CA' else substring(PC,4,2) end) where KeyID = '[batchID]-data3'
Update x set Flex7 = y.Product from TransX x inner join PCtrs y on x.PC = y.PCtr where KeyID = '[batchID]'
Update x set Flex7 = m.field2 from TransX x inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Field1 = x.Flex7 and m.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m.ID = 'PC' and m.Descr = 'Product' where KeyID = '[batchID]'
Update x set Flex8 = m.field2 from TransX x inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Field1 = x.Co and m.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m.ID = 'PC' and m.Descr = 'Co' where KeyID = '[batchID]'
insert into TransX (KeyID, Flex4,Flex5,Flex6,Amt1) (select '[batchID]-data4', Flex4,Flex5,Flex6,round(sum(Amt1),2)  from TransX  where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by Flex4,Flex5,Flex6)

Update t set Amt2 = round(t.Amt1 * 100 / x.Amt1,2) from TransX t inner join (select Flex6,sum(Amt1) as Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data4' group by Flex6) x on t.Flex6 = x.Flex6 where KeyID = '[batchID]-data4'

Update t set Amt2 = round(100 - x.Amt2,2) from TransX t inner join (select Flex6,sum(Amt2) as Amt2 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data4'  and not Flex5 = 'United States' group by Flex6) x on t.Flex6 = x.Flex6 where KeyID = '[batchID]-data4' and Flex5 = 'United States'

Update t set Amt3 = round(t.Amt1 * 100 / x.Amt1,2) from TransX t inner join (select Flex6,sum(Amt1) as Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data4' and not Flex5 = 'United States' group by Flex6) x on t.Flex6 = x.Flex6 where KeyID = '[batchID]-data4' and not Flex5 = 'United States'

Update t set Amt3 = round(100 - x.Amt3,2) from TransX t inner join (select Flex6,sum(Amt3) as Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data4'  and not Flex5 in ('United States','United Kingdom') group by Flex6) x on t.Flex6 = x.Flex6 where KeyID = '[batchID]-data4' and Flex5 = 'United Kingdom' and not Flex5 = 'United States'
Update TransX set Flex4 = '(unassigned)' + Flex5, Flex5 = 'United States' where KeyID = '[batchID]-data4' and coalesce(Flex4,'') = ''
insert into TransX (KeyID, Flex2,Amt1) (select '[batchID]-data5', Flex2,round(sum(Amt1),2)  from TransX  where KeyID = '[batchID]-data3' and Flex6  like '%gross%' group by Flex2)
Update TransX set Amt2 = round(Amt1 * 100 / (select sum(Amt1) as Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data5'),2) where KeyID = '[batchID]-data5'
Update TransX set Amt2 = round(100 - (select sum(Amt2) as Amt2 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data5'  and not Flex2 = 'CA'),2) where KeyID = '[batchID]-data5' and Flex2 = 'CA'
insert into TransX (KeyID, Flex2,Amt1) (select '[batchID]-data6', Flex7,round(sum(Amt1),2)  from TransX  where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex6 like '%gross%' group by Flex7)
Update TransX set Amt2 = round(Amt1 * 100 / (select sum(Amt1) as Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data6'),2) where KeyID = '[batchID]-data6'
Update TransX set Amt2 = round(100 - (select sum(Amt2) as Amt2 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data6'  and not Flex2 = 'CA'),2) where KeyID = '[batchID]-data6' and Flex2 = 'CA'

sqlSelect.descr: insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, PC, BusCat, RiskTerr,ReinLoc,Amt1) values ('[batchID]',
